title: Nutrition: GTCEu
description: Makes GTCEu be compatible with Nutrition(UEL)!
body:
This makes GTCEu's MetaItem be compatible with [NutritionUEL](https://modrinth.com/mod/nutrition-unofficial-extended-life).

So you can add nutirient configs!

＊[GregTech Food Option](https://modrinth.com/mod/gregtech-food-option) is now compatible with NutritionUEL, so the mod is only for GTCEu's original food (ex. Chocolate Coin).  

![Chocolate Coin with dairy nutrient](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/004739fe117e3358d2c603d4001ebe6f8d2ecf75.png)
